name: 愣头青
uprightMeaning: 你现在就像刚辞了职还没找下家的那种快乐——虽然兜里没钱，但嘴角在上扬。别想太多，想多了你就动不了了。记住：最差的结果也就是丢人，丢人又不花钱。
reversedMeaning: 别人都在劝你"冷静想想"，你其实知道这事不靠谱，但你就是想试试。算了，先把淘宝购物车清了再决定吧，至少那个能退货。

connections.narrative: 愣头青碰上整活大师——你有胆子冲，他有本事接。但小心，别把自己的梦想外包出去，最后发现你在给别人打工。
connections.narrativeEn: Leeroy Jenkins meets the DIY Guru — you've got the audacity AND the skills. This is either going to be legendary or a legendary disaster, and honestly? Either way it'll make a great story. Just don't outsource your dream to someone else's vision board.

connections.narrative: 愣头青刚迈腿，命运的转盘就开始抽风——你以为是自己选的路，其实是老天在玩大转盘。顺着转吧，反正也下不了车。
connections.narrativeEn: Leeroy Jenkins and RNGesus in the same draw — you're about to yeet yourself into a situation while fate spins the wheel. The timing is either perfectly aligned or cosmically chaotic. Either way, the universe is holding the camera.

connections.narrative: 愣头青遇上死神——刚开始就结束了？不是的，是要你旧的不去新的不来。你手里攥着的东西该扔了，空手跳崖才叫信仰嘛。
connections.narrativeEn: Leeroy Jenkins walks into The Big Unsubscribe — a new beginning that requires an old ending. You can't start the next chapter if you're still rereading the last one. The leap works better with empty hands. Let go, then go.

connections.narrative: 愣头青碰上了高塔——你以为自己在新世界探险，结果老天直接把你搭的积木一脚踹翻。塌了的都不是真的，虽然真的也碎了几块。
connections.narrativeEn: Leeroy Jenkins meets The Sudden Uninstall — your blind enthusiasm just walked face-first into a wrecking ball. The good news? The structures that crumble were never solid to begin with. The bad news? Yeah, it still hurts. Rubble makes great foundations though.

connections.narrative: 愣头青和世界同框——从零开始的异世界生活直接快进到大结局。你有潜力走到终点，但前提是别在第一集就浪死了。
connections.narrativeEn: Leeroy Jenkins on one end, Achievement Unlocked on the other — the fool's journey from 'I have no idea what I'm doing' to 'I still have no idea but I'm done.' The one who starts and the one who finishes are the same person, just with better stories.

uprightMeaningEn: You've got that 'just quit my job with no backup plan' energy — broke but grinning. Don't overthink it; thinking is what stops people from doing stupid things that become great stories. Worst case: you embarrass yourself, and embarrassment is free.
reversedMeaningEn: Everyone's telling you to 'think it through.' Deep down you know this is a bad idea, but you still wanna send it. At least clear your Amazon cart first — those purchases have a return policy.

name: 整活大师
uprightMeaning: 你现在手里啥都有——能力、资源、人脉，就像打游戏开局捡了满配装备。问题不是"能不能"，而是"你倒是动啊"。别在那琢磨完美方案了，先干再说。
reversedMeaning: 每天给自己列八条待办，睡前勾了半条。你不是没能力，你是没开始。还有一种可能：你在忽悠别人，或者被别人忽悠。醒醒，看看聊天记录。

connections.narrative: 整活大师撞上冰山女祭司——一个能说会道一个沉默是金，一个在狂输出一个在冷眼旁观。别光顾着操作，听听那个不说话的人，她脑子比你好使。
connections.narrativeEn: The DIY Guru meets Miss Know-It-All — action meets intuition, and they're giving each other the side-eye. You have all the tools AND all the wisdom, which means you have no excuse. Build it, but build it smart.

connections.narrative: 整活大师碰上恶魔——你的才华能建高楼也能挖坑把自己埋了。问问自己：是你在耍酷，还是酷在耍你？别把自己的技能点点到奇怪的方向上去了。
connections.narrativeEn: The DIY Guru face to face with The Toxic Ex — your talents are real, but where are they pointed? Same hands that build can also dig a hole. Ask yourself: are you creating or just coping in a really elaborate way?

connections.narrative: 整活大师被星星点化——原来不是为了装X，是真的可以做点有意义的事。把你的能力用在该用的地方，万一火了还能说「我是为了艺术」。
connections.narrativeEn: The DIY Guru blessed by The Hopepunk Star — your skills just got a purpose upgrade. You're not just making things; you're making things that matter. Channel the talent into something that heals instead of just impresses.

uprightMeaningEn: You've got all the tools and you're not afraid to use them — YouTube tutorials have prepared you for this moment. The universe is your IKEA furniture and you didn't even look at the instructions. Manifest responsibly.
reversedMeaningEn: You're either under-selling yourself or about to start a project that'll end up on r/DiWHY. Talent is there, but direction is not. Put the glue gun down and make an actual plan.

name: 直觉狂
uprightMeaning: 你心里早就知道答案了，只是还在等别人说出来替你确认。别等了，你那个"说不上来但感觉不对"的直觉，比任何人的分析都准。
reversedMeaning: 要么是有人瞒着你什么事，要么是你自己在骗自己。反正有一个真相被捂着。最近少刷朋友圈，容易看出不该看的东西。

connections.narrative: 冰山女祭司和孤寡隐士——两个最不爱说话的人凑一块了。一个在心里知道，一个在山里找。别问了，答案就在你脑子里，把手机静音就能听见。
connections.narrativeEn: Miss Know-It-All and The Wi-Fi Hermit — two flavors of solitude, one rich inner world between them. She knows without speaking; he searches without stopping. The answers are inside you. Turn off the notifications and actually listen.

connections.narrative: 女祭司碰见倒吊人——脑子想通了但身体还在倒挂。有时候你想得再多也不如换个姿势看世界。别分析来分析去了，挂一会，答案自己浮上来。
connections.narrativeEn: Miss Know-It-All meets The Chill Hang — knowing meets surrendering. Your brain wants answers but the universe has you in a headlock of patience. Stop trying to solve the puzzle and just hang there. Clarity arrives when you stop strangling it.

connections.narrative: 女祭司和月亮——你的直觉说前方有坑，但月亮说坑里可能有宝藏。相信第六感，但也看看脚下。直觉很重要，白日梦也得分场合。
connections.narrativeEn: Miss Know-It-All navigating The 3 AM Thoughts — your intuition is real but the shadows are running a disinformation campaign. Trust your gut, but fact-check before acting. Not every ominous feeling is a prophecy; some are just indigestion.

uprightMeaningEn: Your gut feeling has a PhD and your intuition is running circles around everyone else's logic. You don't need to explain yourself — the people who get it, get it. The people who don't can argue with your silence.
reversedMeaningEn: You're sitting on a goldmine of insight but you've convinced yourself it's just anxiety. Spoiler: that 'random hunch' is actually your subconscious connecting dots. Stop second-guessing and trust the vibe.

name: 躺平享受
uprightMeaning: 别卷了，今天适合躺着。犒赏自己一顿好的、买个想要很久的东西、或者干脆在家睡一天。你又不是机器，给自己充个电不犯法。
reversedMeaning: 最近是不是有点过度"照顾"别人了？操心操到别人嫌烦，或者花太多钱在"治愈自己"上。还有，你窗台上那盆植物快死了，去浇水。

connections.narrative: 大地之母撞上霸道总裁——温柔与铁腕的世纪对决。一个说「要有爱」，一个说「要有规矩」。最好的结果是：花园有围栏，围栏里有花。
connections.narrativeEn: Mother Nature's CEO and The Big Boss — the sacred marriage of nurture and structure. One grows the garden, the other builds the fence. Too much softness and things fall apart; too much rigidity and nothing blooms. You need both, and you know it.

connections.narrative: 女皇遇见恋人——当富婆动了真情。丰盛的能量全涌向感情线：爱自己还是爱别人？选一个吧，不选的话剧情会变成烂俗三角恋。
connections.narrativeEn: Mother Nature's CEO encounters The Situationship — abundance meets a big choice. Love, in whatever form, is the theme. Self-love, romantic love, or that one person you should probably stop texting. Let your heart lead, but bring your brain as the plus-one.

connections.narrative: 女皇和星星同台——母爱的丰盛加上宇宙的许愿池。不是白日梦，是真的会开花。前提是你真的在浇水，不是每天盯着花盆念叨「快长啊」。
connections.narrativeEn: Mother Nature's CEO under The Hopepunk Star — a double blessing of abundance and hope. This is not wishful thinking; this is grounded optimism that knows the garden will bloom because you've been out there watering it. Keep going.

uprightMeaningEn: You're in full earth-goddess mode — nurturing everything, growing everywhere, making it look effortless. Your energy right now could make a cactus bloom. Share the abundance; there's plenty to go around.
reversedMeaningEn: You're giving so much to everyone else that you forgot to water your own plants. Self-care isn't selfish, it's maintenance. The goddess needs a spa day too.

name: 我说了算
uprightMeaning: 该你做主了。别怂，就是拍板的人就是你。定规矩、分任务、把话说明白——别人不配合不是因为你不对，是因为你没摆出"这事我说了算"的姿态。
reversedMeaning: 你是不是在管太多不该你管的事？或者反过来，被一个控制狂搞得喘不过气？不管是哪种，记住：不是所有东西都需要你的意见。

connections.narrative: 霸道总裁见教皇——一个管人一个管魂，一个定法律一个写教条。这两位要是意见统一，你就是开国皇帝；不统一的话，先理清楚到底谁说了算。
connections.narrativeEn: The Big Boss and The Tradition Guy — secular power meets spiritual authority. Law and faith, structure and belief. When they agree, you're building an institution. When they clash, figure out which authority actually serves YOUR highest good, not just the highest-ranking one.

connections.narrative: 皇帝站在法官面前——你再牛也得守法。权力再大也有天花版，做的事情全写在天平上了。别想着走后门，正义的眼睛是雪亮的。
connections.narrativeEn: The Big Boss called before Receipts — power is about to get audited. No throne is above the law, and the receipts are being pulled. If you've been fair, relax. If you've been... flexible with the rules, maybe start practicing your apology.

connections.narrative: 皇帝的高墙遇上了高塔的拆迁队——你苦苦经营的人设、规则、安全区，全在地震中稀碎。碎就碎吧，本来就该重修了。下次别忘了打地基。
connections.narrativeEn: The Big Boss faces The Sudden Uninstall — your fortress is being stress-tested by reality. Control systems, hierarchies, carefully built walls — if they were on shaky ground, they won't survive the quake. What crumbles was never permanent. Rebuild with better blueprints.

uprightMeaningEn: Structure? You've got it. Authority? Wear it like a well-tailored suit. You're the one with the plan, the spreadsheet, and the five-year projection. Just make sure you're building an empire, not a prison — for yourself.
reversedMeaningEn: Control issues are showing. You're micromanaging the universe and the universe does not report to you. Loosen the grip before you choke out all the fun. Not everything needs a policy document.

name: 按部就班
uprightMeaning: 听人劝吃饱饭。有些路已经有人趟过了，你不需要重新发明轮子。找个靠谱的前辈问问，或者老老实实按流程走——效率可能比你瞎折腾高得多。
reversedMeaning: 规矩是死的，人是活的。你现在需要打破常规，别当那个"别人都这么干所以我也这么干"的人。偷偷说，那个你觉得很厉害的"传统做法"，可能早就过时了。

connections.narrative: 教皇遇见隐士——别人教你的那套信仰，轮到你自己去验证了。传统是参考书不是标准答案，别把教条当真理，出去走走，自己体会。
connections.narrativeEn: The Tradition Guy and The Wi-Fi Hermit — inherited wisdom versus personal truth. The old books have answers, but the solo journey has different questions. Maybe it's time to check if the beliefs you were handed still fit the person you're becoming.

connections.narrative: 教皇和正义站一块——再老的规矩也得过良心这一关。如果传统不公正，那就该改改了。真正的智慧知道什么时候该守，什么时候该破。
connections.narrativeEn: The Tradition Guy alongside Receipts — tradition measured against truth. Ancient doesn't automatically mean wise, and old rules that fail the fairness test are overdue for a rewrite. Honor the roots, but don't worship them if they're poisoning the soil.

uprightMeaningEn: You're the keeper of the sacred 'how we've always done it.' There's wisdom in the old ways — but also maybe some outdated clauses. Know the rules well enough to know which ones are actually vibes rather than laws.
reversedMeaningEn: Dogma alert. You're following rules you never questioned and quoting authorities you've never fact-checked. Tradition without reflection is just peer pressure from dead people.

name: 二选一
uprightMeaning: 有个人或者有个选项正在你面前晃，你知道该选哪个，就是不敢下决心。遵循你的价值观选，别违心。顺便——如果是感情问题，这张牌的意思就是：别问了，A 和 B 之间，你心里早偏了。
reversedMeaning: 选错了，或者在逃避选择。要么是跟一个不合适的人耗着，要么是在两个都不咋地的选项里反复纠结。拖着不会变好，只会让两个都错过。

connections.narrative: 恋人选完了，战车一脚油门踩到底——心动之后就是行动。但前提是真的是你选的，不是被荷尔蒙劫持的。方向盘握好，别开到别人家门口去了。
connections.narrativeEn: The Situationship and Full Send Chariot — heart decides, then horsepower delivers. A meaningful choice meets determined action. Just make sure the decision was actually yours and not your hormones wearing a trench coat pretending to be rational thought.

connections.narrative: 恋人和节制——爱得死去活来的时候，节制出来说了句「冷静点」。不是叫你分手，是叫你别把整个人生兑进去了。爱的浓度太高会中毒的。
connections.narrativeEn: The Situationship and The Vibe Balancer — passion looking for its equilibrium. Intense feelings want to flood everything, but chemistry happens in the blend, not the tsunami. Love hard, but don't dissolve yourself in another person.

connections.narrative: 恋人和恶魔——我爱你但我是不是被你控制了？爱让人自由，执念让人坐牢。诚实地看看你的关系：是真爱还是不敢走？前者在笑，后者在抖。
connections.narrativeEn: The Situationship meets The Toxic Ex — the light and shadow of attachment. Love liberates; obsession takes hostages. Same relationship can be sanctuary or prison. Honestly examine: are you choosing freely, or are you just afraid to be alone?

uprightMeaningEn: A choice is standing in front of you wearing a very attractive outfit. Love, partnership, or a crossroads that feels like a rom-com climax. Pick with your whole chest — half measures get half results. And yes, it IS that deep.
reversedMeaningEn: You're stuck in analysis paralysis between two (or more) options, and they're all starting to look the same. The real choice isn't between people or paths — it's between who you've been and who you're becoming. Choose the one that makes future-you proud, not just present-you comfortable.

name: 就是干
uprightMeaning: 你现在有一股"谁都别拦我"的劲头。很好，用起来。方向大致对就行，细节路上再调。这个阶段最重要的是——先动起来，而不是先论证为什么能成功。
reversedMeaning: 莽撞了。你不是在冲，你是在乱撞。或者你想冲但是方向盘在别人手里。先停下来看看是你在开车还是车在开你。

connections.narrative: 战车加力量——一个猛冲一个扛揍。你能冲出去的，因为你是真的硬。但这组牌提醒你：赢了之后别嘚瑟，温柔地收拾战场。
connections.narrativeEn: Full Send Chariot and Big Cat Energy — victory driven by willpower, sustained by quiet strength. You've got both the speed to win AND the resilience to last. Conquer with compassion; the flex is stronger when it's gentle.

connections.narrative: 战车遇上了命运转盘——你油门踩到底结果路变成了过山车。努力重要，但时机更玄学。使劲开，但也别跟天意较劲，轮子比你大。
connections.narrativeEn: Full Send Chariot meets RNGesus — your determined advance just hit the cosmic roulette wheel. You can steer but you can't control the road. Push forward with everything, but respect that timing is as important as speed. Even F1 cars need to pit.

uprightMeaningEn: Victory is loading and you've got both hands on the wheel. You're moving fast, driven by pure willpower and possibly caffeine. Nothing can stop you — just make sure you're driving toward your own finish line, not someone else's.
reversedMeaningEn: You're speeding but the GPS is recalculating. Aggression without direction is just a tantrum with better PR. Pull over, check the map, then floor it.

name: 温柔猛人
uprightMeaning: 真正的强者不是嗓门大的那个，是明明可以发飙但选择好好说话的那个。你现在有这个底气——不用吼，别人也能感觉到你不是好惹的。
reversedMeaning: 绷不住了。你一直在压着某件事，快压不住了。偶尔发个疯是可以的，别当真把自己当圣人。
keywords: 忍一时越想越气（但忍住了）

connections.narrative: 力量和隐士——外面的猛兽要对付，心里的野兽也要安抚。不用每时每刻都是强者，该退就退，狮子也打盹的。
connections.narrativeEn: Big Cat Energy and The Wi-Fi Hermit — outer courage replenished by inner solitude. You don't always have to be the strong one. Retreat isn't weakness; even apex predators spend most of their time napping. Rest, then return.

connections.narrative: 力量和正义——温柔和公正站在一起。真正的正义不是冷冰冰的法条，是带着理解在判。真正的力量不是拳头硬，是心态稳。你心里那杆秤，稳了吗？
connections.narrativeEn: Big Cat Energy and Receipts — compassion standing next to fairness. True justice isn't cold, and true strength isn't force. It's holding the scales steady even when your own heart is in the balance. That's the real flex.

uprightMeaningEn: You've got that quiet strength — the kind that doesn't need to roar to be felt. It's not about crushing your enemies; it's about them knowing you could, and choosing not to. That's power. That's growth. That's hot.
reversedMeaningEn: You've been strong for so long you forgot it's okay to be soft. You're not a tank; you're a human. Let someone else carry the heavy stuff for a minute. The lion naps 20 hours a day and nobody calls it weak.

name: 想静静
uprightMeaning: 你现在需要一个人待着。不回消息很正常，不想社交很正常。这不是抑郁，是在消化。想明白了再出来，不用跟谁解释。
reversedMeaning: 宅太久了，该出来透透气。你不是在深度思考，你是在内耗。一个人琢磨了三天的问题，可能跟朋友聊五分钟就能解——但你不聊，对吧？

connections.narrative: 隐士碰到了倒吊人——找得太累了，不如倒挂一会儿。真理不是搜出来的，有时候是你不再找了，它自己敲门的。别卷了，歇着。
connections.narrativeEn: The Wi-Fi Hermit encounters The Chill Hang — the search deepens into surrender. You've been looking so hard you forgot how to be still. Wisdom isn't always found by seeking; sometimes it sneaks in when you stop doom-scrolling for meaning.

connections.narrative: 隐士的灯笼照到了星星——一个人在山洞里修行，终于看到了天上的光。你没有白闭关。把你的心得出关分享，说不定还能涨粉。
connections.narrativeEn: The Wi-Fi Hermit sees The Hopepunk Star — the solo cave journey was worth it. The light you found in the dark? Other people need to see it too. Come out of hermit mode; your insights are shareable content now.

uprightMeaningEn: You've gone off-grid — emotionally, socially, maybe literally. Your phone is on Do Not Disturb and your soul is doing a system update. The answers you're looking for aren't in the group chat. Stay in your cave; the clarity will come.
reversedMeaningEn: You've isolated so hard you forgot how to people. Solitude is medicine but too much becomes poison. Come out of the cave occasionally — the world has snacks and sunlight.

name: 风水轮流转
uprightMeaning: 运气来了。不是你的能力强，就是时机对了。别太谦虚，该接住就接住。但记住——转盘正在往上转，不代表永远不往下。
reversedMeaning: 水逆。干什么都差一口气，不是你的问题，就是运气不好。这种情况最重要的是别搞大动作，苟住，等风来。

connections.narrative: 命运转盘加死神——运气的风云变幻直接升级为人生版本更新。光是转运不够，你得换号重练。别怕，新版本通常比旧版本好用。
connections.narrativeEn: RNGesus and The Big Unsubscribe — the wheel turns and something ends simultaneously. Luck changes and so must you. A change of circumstances isn't the same as a change of self, but when they arrive together, you're being upgraded, not just relocated.

connections.narrative: 命运转盘和审判——走了大运还是走了背运？不管哪个，审判都在问：你准备好了没有？因为下一个拐角不是在考验你的运气，而是考验你的人品。
connections.narrativeEn: RNGesus meets The Wake-Up Call — a turning point in circumstances AND an inner alarm going off. You're not just being carried by events; you're being asked to respond to them. The wheel presents the opportunity; the wake-up call asks what you'll do with it.

uprightMeaningEn: The wheel is spinning and your number might just come up. Luck, fate, the algorithm — whatever you call it, something bigger is turning. Ride the wave while it lasts, but don't get cocky. The wheel giveth and the wheel taketh away.
reversedMeaningEn: Bad luck streak — the universe is rolling nat 1s on your behalf. Don't spiral; wheels turn. This too shall pass, but maybe don't make any big bets until the cycle flips.

name: 报应来了
uprightMeaning: 你是对的，别让步。或者——你做错了，该认。总之这张牌的意思是：事实长什么样，结果就长什么样。别指望蒙混过关。
reversedMeaning: 不公平。有人耍赖，或者你在耍赖。不管是哪种，这事迟早会翻出来。早认早解脱。

connections.narrative: 正义和审判——今天判赢的官司，到了终极裁决那关可能翻盘。别心存侥幸，你的所作所为会被更高清的摄像头录下来的。
connections.narrativeEn: Receipts and The Wake-Up Call — today's verdict meets the final audit. What seems fair now might be reweighed under a brighter light. Your actions echo beyond the present. Make choices you'd be comfortable having read aloud at your cosmic performance review.

uprightMeaningEn: The truth will out. Actions have consequences, karma keeps records, and the universe is about to present its case with citations. If you've been playing fair, relax — you'll like the verdict. If not... maybe settle out of court.
reversedMeaningEn: You're avoiding accountability like it's a Terms of Service page. Justice delayed isn't justice denied, and the bill is accruing interest. Own your stuff before someone else does it for you, and less kindly.

name: 战略性躺平
uprightMeaning: 别挣扎了，越挣扎越难受。你现在需要的就是——什么都不做。换个角度看看这个问题，也许你一直盯着的那个"出口"根本就是死路，旁边就有门。
reversedMeaning: 你宁愿难受也不愿意换个思路。或者你在假装"我在等待，我在思考"，其实只是在拖延。别装了，你就是不想面对。

connections.narrative: 倒吊人遇上死神——不把你挂舒服了是不会动手重装的。甘心停下来的那一刻，真正的改变就开始了。别把放手当失败，它是在为起飞清跑道。
connections.narrativeEn: The Chill Hang followed by The Big Unsubscribe — surrender before transformation. You can't be remade while you're still death-gripping your old shape. The pause isn't punishment; it's prep. Let go, not in defeat, but in readiness. The next version of you is loading.

uprightMeaningEn: You're suspended in a moment of forced pause and it feels like limbo, but it's actually a loading screen. The universe has you in time-out for a reason. Stop struggling, surrender to the upside-down, and let the new perspective download.
reversedMeaningEn: You're stuck and blaming everything except your refusal to let go. The hang isn't a punishment — it's a preview. See things differently before you're allowed to move. Yes, it's frustrating. No, fighting it won't help.

name: 翻篇了
uprightMeaning: 有件你一直抓着不放的事，该结束了。工作、感情、习惯、心态——你知道我说的是哪个。结束不等于失败，有时候及时止损就是最大的胜利。
reversedMeaning: 死拖着。你明明知道该翻篇了，还在那里"万一呢"。没有万一，就是没了。不下牌桌不代表你会赢，只代表你还在输。

connections.narrative: 死神碰上节制——送走旧的别太快，等新的来也别太急。蜕变有它自己的节奏。在这段过渡期，别慌，做一杯温水，静静等茶叶泡开。
connections.narrativeEn: The Big Unsubscribe and The Vibe Balancer — transformation finding its equilibrium. Endings don't need to be rushed OR resisted. Between the unsubscribe and the new subscription, there's a free trial period of just... being. Use it.

connections.narrative: 死神后面跟着星星——关一道门开一扇窗这个老套的比喻用在这里太合适了。哭完该哭的，然后抬头。光早就在了，你只是刚才低着头。
connections.narrativeEn: The Big Unsubscribe and The Hopepunk Star — the classic 'door closes, window opens' but make it cosmic. What's being ripped away is making room for something actually aligned with who you're becoming. Grieve, then look up. The light already clocked in.

uprightMeaningEn: Something is ending, and honestly? It was time. Death is just the universe's way of saying 'you've outgrown this, I'm taking it away for your own good.' Grieve the loss, then check your pockets — you might find you're lighter without it.
reversedMeaningEn: You're clinging to a corpse of a situation and it's starting to smell. The thing you're afraid to lose is already gone; you're just holding the receipt. Let it decompose. Compost becomes flowers.

name: 别走极端
uprightMeaning: 你已经找到了自己的节奏——不慌不忙，既不太拼也不太懒。保持住。这一张牌的意思是：平衡就是最好的状态，不是最强，是最久。
reversedMeaning: 最近有点失控了。要么工作到凌晨三点，要么躺到下午三点。酒精、奶茶、短视频——有一个东西正在榨干你的时间。找回来平衡，别等身体喊停。

connections.narrative: 节制的平衡术遇上恶魔的诱惑——你能保持清醒吗？恶魔在耳边说「再玩一次」，节制在心里说「差不多得了」。这场内心的拔河，看谁能赢。
connections.narrativeEn: The Vibe Balancer versus The Toxic Ex — moderation holding the line against obsession. Your inner monk is arm-wrestling your inner demon. Can you keep the middle path when something is pulling hard toward the edge? The balanced choice is the brave choice here.

uprightMeaningEn: You're the alchemist, mixing chaos and calm in exactly the right proportions. Moderation isn't boring — it's the secret sauce that keeps everything from catching fire. Find your middle path and walk it like a runway.
reversedMeaningEn: You're oscillating between extremes trying to find balance by swinging harder. That's not how pendulums work. Slow down. The middle path isn't a compromise; it's a strategy.

name: 上头了
uprightMeaning: 你被什么东西拴住了——可能是一个人、一份工作、一个习惯、或者单纯的工资。你知道不健康，但你说服自己"没办法"。醒醒，你不是没办法，你是不想走。
reversedMeaning: 好消息：你终于看清自己在被什么控制了。坏消息：看清和挣脱是两码事。不过至少你已经开始想跑了，这是一个很棒的起点。

connections.narrative: 恶魔绑你，高塔炸你——你自己拆不掉的枷锁，被外部的力量一把炸飞。虽然方式有点暴力，但结果是你自由了。下次别等被炸了才放手，主动点行不行？
connections.narrativeEn: The Toxic Ex triggers The Sudden Uninstall — the chains you couldn't break yourself get shattered by external force. What you wouldn't release voluntarily is being yeeted for you. Painful? Yes. Effective? Also yes. You're free now. Don't go back for the handcuffs.

uprightMeaningEn: Something has a grip on you — a habit, a person, a 'treat yourself' that's become 'trap yourself.' You know it's bad for you. That little whisper of 'one more time'? That's not your friend. That's the devil wearing your favorite hoodie.
reversedMeaningEn: You're this close to breaking free but you've convinced yourself the cage is cozy. Spoiler: it's still a cage. The chains are loose enough to slip — you just have to want to. The door's been unlocked the whole time.

name: 塌房现场
uprightMeaning: 崩了。你建了很久的那个东西——计划、关系、人设——说塌就塌。但说真的，塌的那玩意质量本来就有问题，早晚的事。先收拾碎片，别急着重建。
reversedMeaning: 你知道要出事了，在拼命打补丁。或者灾难已经发生但你假装没事。别硬撑了，承认"是的，这事黄了"比维持体面重要得多。

connections.narrative: 高塔塌了，废墟上升起一颗星星——塔罗界的经典名场面。旧的假的全倒了，剩下的是真东西。你活过了扫除日，现在看看：什么是值得你带进新生活的？
connections.narrativeEn: The Sudden Uninstall followed by The Hopepunk Star — the most iconic duo in tarot. Destruction clears the stage, then hope walks on. The lightning took out the fake stuff; the star illuminates what's left. You survived the collapse. What remains is realer than what fell.

uprightMeaningEn: Everything you thought was stable is getting a surprise audit from the universe, and the inspectors brought sledgehammers. The tower was built on assumptions anyway. Let it crumble — the foundation that survives is the only part worth keeping.
reversedMeaningEn: You saw the cracks and kept decorating. Now the wall's coming down and you're acting surprised. The universe doesn't do 'gentle suggestions' when you ignore the polite warnings. Duck, cover, and thank the wrecking crew later.

name: 会好的
uprightMeaning: 暴风雨过去了。你现在可以松一口气，看看天，发发呆。疗愈正在发生，不用刻意做什么。这一张牌就是在告诉你——会好的，而且已经开始好了。
reversedMeaning: 你觉得不会好了。但其实会的，只是你现在看不到。别在深夜做任何重大决定，也别在心情最差的时候评价自己的人生。

connections.narrative: 星星在月亮迷雾里前行——希望是真的，但路不好走。乐观主义要被未知吓一吓。别让暂时的黑暗说服你「光不存在」。往前走，月亮只是路过。
connections.narrativeEn: The Hopepunk Star navigating The 3 AM Thoughts — your hope is real but the path is foggy. The light you follow exists, even when shadows try to gaslight you into thinking you imagined it. Keep walking. The moon is just a phase.

connections.narrative: 星星熬成了太阳——从微弱的光到灿烂的天。你的小愿望长大了。放心享受快乐，别觉得自己不配。你扛过的夜够长了，晒太阳是基本人权。
connections.narrativeEn: The Hopepunk Star becomes The Golden Retriever — hope graduating to full-blown joy. What started as a tiny wish in the dark is now broad daylight happiness. Don't feel guilty for feeling good. You walked through enough shadow; the sun is your severance package.

uprightMeaningEn: After the chaos, after the rain, one stubborn little light is still twinkling. That's you. That's hope. It's not naive optimism — it's been-through-the-worst-and-still-here energy. Make a wish; you've earned the right.
reversedMeaningEn: You're hoping but not acting. Wishing on a star while your feet are stuck in cement. The light is real but you have to walk toward it. Hope is a direction, not a destination.

name: 疑神疑鬼
uprightMeaning: 你现在看到的信息不完整。有人在瞒你，或者你自己脑补了太多。不要在这个阶段做重大决定——因为你手里拿的是剧本，不是事实。
reversedMeaning: 迷雾开始散了，你能看清谁是人是鬼了。虽然真相可能不太好看，但至少不用再猜了。

connections.narrative: 月亮熬成了太阳——漫漫长夜的恐惧、胡思乱想、自我怀疑，在太阳面前全现了原形。原来没那么可怕。天亮的感觉真好，把窗户打开。
connections.narrativeEn: The 3 AM Thoughts giving way to The Golden Retriever — the anxious night finally meeting its sunrise. Those shapes that haunted you? Coat racks. Those fears? Overblown. The dawn makes everything look manageable. Let the clarity in; it's not as scary as you thought.

uprightMeaningEn: Something's lurking in the shadows and your brain is writing fanfiction about it at 3 AM. The moon distorts everything — molehills look like mountains, fears cosplay as intuitions. Shine a light on it; the monster is probably just a coat rack.
reversedMeaningEn: You're lost in the sauce of your own anxiety and calling it 'intuition.' The shadows are real but they're also shapeshifters. Get a second opinion from daylight before you make any life-altering decisions at midnight.

name: 赢麻了
uprightMeaning: 这是整副牌里最好的一张。你现在做什么都对，气场全开。抓住这个机会——该表白表白，该谈加薪谈加薪，该发朋友圈炫耀就别低调。
reversedMeaning: 最近可能有点丧，但问题是暂时的。你的内核还是好的，就是被云遮了一下。别因为今天不顺就否定自己所有的光芒。

connections.narrative: 太阳和世界一起登场——快乐不只是五分钟的多巴胺，而是一个完整的圆。你熬过了一整个循环，走到了这里。拍拍自己，你配得上这一刻的幸福。
connections.narrativeEn: The Golden Retriever and Achievement Unlocked — pure joy reaching its final form. This isn't a fleeting good mood; it's a completed cycle. You did the work, you took the hits, you made it. Celebrate like you mean it. The credits can roll for a minute before the sequel starts.

uprightMeaningEn: The sun is out, the vibes are immaculate, and you're radiating main-character-in-the-final-scene energy. Success, joy, vitality — this is the card that makes other cards jealous. Soak it in. You've earned this victory lap.
reversedMeaningEn: The sun's behind a cloud but it's still there. You're temporarily dimmed, not permanently dark. Don't let a passing mood convince you the light is gone. Vitamin D and a walk might literally fix it.

name: 是时候了
uprightMeaning: 你心里有个声音一直在叫你——去做那件你一直在回避的事。不是别人的期待，是你自己真正想做的。别再按掉这个"闹钟"了，它不会自己停。
reversedMeaning: 你在逃避一个召唤。不是工作 offer，是你内心深处知道自己应该走的方向。也可能——你对自己的评价太苛刻了，把自己审判得太狠。

connections.narrative: 审判把门推开，世界在门后——你答应的召唤带你走到了终章。现在的你拉黑了一年前的自己。蜕皮完成，进去吧，新世界已经加载好了。
connections.narrativeEn: The Wake-Up Call leads to Achievement Unlocked — you answered the call and it brought you to completion. You're not the same person who started this level. The new world you're stepping into? It matches the person you became. Rise and enter.

uprightMeaningEn: An alarm is going off in your soul and it's not the snooze-button kind. You're being called to rise, to answer for your choices, to become the version of yourself that future-you is waiting for. This is the rebirth. Say yes.
reversedMeaningEn: You're hitting snooze on your own awakening. The call is coming from inside the house and you're pretending it's a wrong number. Wake up. The person you're meant to become is getting impatient.

name: 圆满了
uprightMeaning: 恭喜，你把一个阶段打通关了。一个项目、一段关系、一段成长——完成了，而且是漂亮的完成。好好庆祝，然后准备进入下一关。
reversedMeaning: 快了，就差最后一步。别在终点线前面停下来，要么是你在磨蹭，要么是有个小问题没解决。搞定它。
uprightMeaningEn: You've completed the cycle. The quest is done, the boss is defeated, the credits are rolling on this chapter of your life. Take the victory lap, do a little dance, and then — get ready. Completion just means you're ready for the next bigger thing.
reversedMeaningEn: You're almost at the finish line but you're slowing down because finishing is scary. What comes after the end? The next beginning. Don't delay your own completion just because you're afraid of the sequel.

name: 心动预警
uprightMeaning: 一股新的情感正在涌进来——crush、新的爱好、或者突然想对自己好一点。别压抑，这是好事。内心满得要溢出来的时候，就让它溢，别拧上盖子。
reversedMeaning: 想哭哭不出来，或者想爱不敢爱。你的情绪水龙头好像被拧死了。找个人说出来会好很多，哪怕边说边哭也行。
uprightMeaningEn: New love or creative spark incoming. Your emotional inbox has a new message and it's not spam.
reversedMeaningEn: Emotional blockage. You've dammed up your feelings and the reservoir is getting dangerously full. Let a little out before it bursts.

name: 双向奔赴
uprightMeaning: 你们俩——不管是恋人还是搭档——现在是双向奔赴。不用猜来猜去，对方也在想你。这种关系很稀有，好好珍惜。
reversedMeaning: 不对等了。你给的多对方给的少，或者反过来。总之有一方在认真，另一方在敷衍。聊聊吧，聊不开就是结果。
uprightMeaningEn: A budding connection — romantic or platonic, someone just leveled up in your heart.
reversedMeaningEn: One-sided emotional investment. You're giving premium access to someone on a free trial. Read the terms and conditions.

name: 姐妹局
uprightMeaning: 该约朋友出来吃饭喝酒了！最近的快乐来源是朋友，不是工作。别一个人闷着，群里发个"有人出来吗"。
reversedMeaning: 聚过头了。要么是社交疲劳，要么是有人在你朋友圈里搞小团体排挤你。还有一种可能——你最近花太多钱在吃喝玩乐上了。
uprightMeaningEn: Three's company and that's a good thing right now. Collaboration, celebration, possibly cake.
reversedMeaningEn: Overindulgence in feelings — you're marinating in your emotions like they're a gourmet dish. Time to get out of the bath.

name: 没兴趣
uprightMeaning: 别人给你递橄榄枝，你看都不看——因为你觉得"就这？"。可能你真的需要更好的，也可能你只是单纯不开心。先搞清楚是"不好"还是"我不高兴"。
reversedMeaning: 突然醒了。之前不感兴趣的某个机会开始看起来不错了。或者你终于意识到自己一直在抱怨但其实拥有的已经很多了。
uprightMeaningEn: You're being offered emotional stability in a chaotic time. Take it. Not everything has to be a rollercoaster.
reversedMeaningEn: Emotional numbness. Something should move you and it's not. Check if you're depressed or just exhausted — both need attention.

name: 伤心了
uprightMeaning: 有东西碎了。你盯着地上的三只翻倒的杯子——但你没注意到，身后还有两只站得好好的。失去的是真的失去了，但剩下的也是真的还在。
reversedMeaning: 开始捡杯子了。悲伤还在，但你已经在想"那接下来怎么办"了。这是一个好信号。
uprightMeaningEn: Something feels off and you're right. Check in on what you've been ignoring. The cups are half empty for a reason.
reversedMeaningEn: Avoiding the emotional accountability conversation. You know what you need to say. The discomfort of saying it is less than the cost of not.

name: 回忆杀
uprightMeaning: 某个过去的人或回忆会突然出现——前同事、老同学、或者小时候爱吃的那种零食。不是让你回到过去，是让你想起自己本来是什么样子。
reversedMeaning: 困在过去了。一直在想"如果当初……"，但你没有时光机。往前看吧，前面的故事比后面的精彩。
uprightMeaningEn: Nostalgia is hitting hard — someone from your emotional past is knocking. Answer thoughtfully, not reflexively.
reversedMeaningEn: Living in the emotional past. The highlight reel of 'what could have been' is not a documentary. Return to the present.

name: 想得美
uprightMeaning: 选项太多了，每一个看起来都很美——但大多数是泡沫。别在脑子里选，拿笔写下来，看看哪个是真实可行的，哪个是你自己加了滤镜。
reversedMeaning: 你终于看清了哪些是虚的哪些是真的。然后发现——好吧，真正靠谱的选择只有两个，不纠结了。
uprightMeaningEn: You've got options and they're all tempting. Don't let the variety paralyze you. Pick your favorite fantasy and commit.
reversedMeaningEn: Decision paralysis among too many emotional options. None of these choices are perfect and waiting won't make one appear. Pick and learn.

name: 走了不回头
uprightMeaning: 你知道该走了。不是被赶走的，是你自己决定——够了。你背着包离开的样子可能有点狼狈，但你走的方向是对的。
reversedMeaning: 想走但迈不开腿。你对现状不满意，但又不确定走了会不会更差。犹豫太久的本质是——现在的痛苦还不够痛。
uprightMeaningEn: Walking away from an emotional situation that no longer serves. It's not giving up; it's upgrading your peace.
reversedMeaningEn: You left but you're still mentally there. The physical exit happened; the emotional one is lagging. Finish the unsubscription.

name: 心想事成
uprightMeaning: 愿望实现卡！你的某个心愿马上就要落地了。坐在那里笑眯眯地看着一切发生就好。允许自己嘚瑟一下。
reversedMeaning: 愿望实现是实现了，但跟你想的不太一样。或者你得到了就不想要了——这就有点欠了。
uprightMeaningEn: Wish granted. Your emotional investment is paying out. Enjoy the overflow without guilt.
reversedMeaningEn: Emotional dissatisfaction despite having everything you asked for. The goalpost moved because you moved it. What are you actually chasing?

name: 圆满大结局
uprightMeaning: 感情/家庭层面的圆满——可能是真的幸福，也可能是一个看起来很美的画面。但如果是真的，恭喜你，这是圣杯系列的终极奖励。
reversedMeaning: 表面和谐，底下暗流涌动。也许家庭的某些问题被你刻意忽略了。别只拍全家福，看看照片外的部分。
uprightMeaningEn: Emotional completion. Your cup is full, your heart is content. This is the 'happily ever after' slide. Savor it.
reversedMeaningEn: Emotional burnout. You gave everything and the well is dry. Refill before you offer anyone else a drink.

name: 萌新
uprightMeaning: 有个小惊喜在路上——可能是一条微信、一个小礼物、或者一个让你开心的消息。带着好奇去接收，别想太多。
reversedMeaning: 期待一个消息但迟迟不来。或者你的热情有点一厢情愿了。先别发小作文。
uprightMeaningEn: A dreamer with a message. Creative inspiration delivered by a soft-hearted messenger. Listen to the gentle nudge.
reversedMeaningEn: The messenger got lost or the message was fake. Romantic delusions incoming. Vet the vibe before you invest.

name: 浪漫攻势
uprightMeaning: 有人（或者是你自己）正在积极追求某个东西——爱情、机会、或梦想。这股冲劲是好的，但别上头太快。浪漫归浪漫，聊天记录该截屏还是截屏。
reversedMeaning: 热情退了，或者对方/你的热情本来就不真诚。还有一种可能是——追太猛把人吓跑了。收一收。
uprightMeaningEn: A romantic offer is riding toward you at full speed. Charming, intense, possibly wearing armor. Say yes to the adventure.
reversedMeaningEn: Charming but unreliable. The romantic gesture is grand but the follow-through is absent. Don't fall for the trailer; wait for the full movie.

name: 共情怪
uprightMeaning: 你现在的情绪感知力很强，能察觉到别人注意不到的细节。用这个能力去照顾自己和你关心的人。但你不需要承担所有人的情绪垃圾。
reversedMeaning: 同理心过载了。你在吸收别人的负面情绪，然后自己崩溃。设立边界不是冷漠，是自我保护。
uprightMeaningEn: The emotional grown-up in the room. Nurture others but don't forget yourself. Your empathy is a superpower, not a service.
reversedMeaningEn: Emotional smothering. Your care is becoming control. Love gives roots AND wings. Check if you're clipping someone's flight feathers.

name: 情绪管理大师
uprightMeaning: 你在这段关系/处境里是那个"稳住了"的人。别人可能在崩溃，你能兜住。这是一种难得的能力——不是没有情绪，是不让情绪控制行为。
reversedMeaning: 情绪压在心底压太久了，可能会爆。或者你在用"我很冷静"来掩饰自己其实很受伤。情绪需要出口，找一个安全的方式放出来。
uprightMeaningEn: Master of emotional intelligence. You've been through the waves and learned to surf. Lead with heart; the competence is assumed.
reversedMeaningEn: Emotional manipulation dressed as maturity. You know better and you're using it to win arguments instead of solve problems. Do better.

name: 冲冲冲
uprightMeaning: 一个新的机会或想法出现了，而且它带着一股"现在就做"的能量。别犹豫，先起个头。这个开始的能量是最纯的，越拖越稀释。
reversedMeaning: 有想法但没动力。或者你起了个头，然后……就没有然后了。不是计划不好，是你需要先把手机放远点。
uprightMeaningEn: A spark of inspiration. New energy, new project, new reason to get out of bed excited. Say yes before your brain talks you out of it.
reversedMeaningEn: The spark won't catch. Frustrating, but maybe the kindling is wet for a reason. Reassess before you strike another match.

name: 选A还是B
uprightMeaning: 你手里有一个选择——留在舒适区还是走出去。这张牌建议你往外看看，那个更大的世界在等你。你手里的球，是时候投出去了。
reversedMeaning: 计划做了一堆，PPT 画得比谁都好看，就是不出发。选择恐惧的本质是怕选错。但选错比不选强。
uprightMeaningEn: You're holding the map for the next adventure. Planning mode is active, and the destination looks amazing.
reversedMeaningEn: Overplanning, under-doing. Your vision board is a museum of things you haven't started. Pick one Post-it and actually execute.

name: 等快递中
uprightMeaning: 你的努力开始有回响了！就像快递显示"已发货"——还没到，但你知道它在路上了。站在高处看看远方，你的规划正在生效。
reversedMeaning: 回报延迟。快递卡在中转站了。或者你之前太乐观了，实际进展没你想的那么快。别着急，调整一下时间表。
uprightMeaningEn: Your ship has come in — or at least it's visible on the horizon. Progress is happening. Keep sailing.
reversedMeaningEn: Setbacks in a project. Progress isn't linear and this dip is part of the curve. Don't abandon ship; patch the leak and keep sailing.

name: 稳了
uprightMeaning: 该庆祝了！一个阶段性的小胜利，值得跟朋友吃顿饭、喝一杯。不是最终的胜利，但足够让你喘口气，享受一下成果。
reversedMeaning: 庆祝被推迟了。或者你根本不想庆祝——因为你觉得自己还没到那个值得庆祝的点。但其实你比自己以为的做得更多。
uprightMeaningEn: Celebration unlocked. The good vibes are earned, not borrowed. Enjoy the party guilt-free.
reversedMeaningEn: The celebration is over and the cleanup crew just arrived. Post-event slump is real. Transition gently, not abruptly.

name: 内卷现场
uprightMeaning: 你被卷进了一场争斗——可能是工作上的竞争，也可能是观点冲突。这不是坏事，竞争能逼出你的真实水平。但也别打成死对头。
reversedMeaning: 你为了避免冲突选择了沉默。或者吵完了但问题没解决。还有一种可能——你发现你在跟自己较劲。
uprightMeaningEn: Conflict incoming — but the productive kind. Competition brings out your best. Just keep it sporty, not personal.
reversedMeaningEn: Conflict that's become personal and petty. You're fighting to win, not to resolve. Step back and ask what you're actually defending.

name: 出风头
uprightMeaning: 赢了！别人看到了你的成果，在给你鼓掌。享受这一刻，但别飘。真正的考验是——赢了之后你怎么继续。
reversedMeaning: 期待表扬但没得到。或者你赢了但是感觉不太对——可能赢的方式不够光彩。还有一种可能是：你需要的认可不是从别人那里来的。
uprightMeaningEn: Victory parade energy. You've won something, and people are noticing. Take the lap.
reversedMeaningEn: The victory felt hollow because it was at someone else's expense. Winning isn't everything if the trophy is made of bad karma.

name: 杠上了
uprightMeaning: 你一个人扛着所有人的质疑，但你站在高位，有优势。坚持住，你的位置是对的。不一定要赢下每一场争论，但不要自己先趴下。
reversedMeaning: 守不住了。或者你在守住一个不该守的东西。分辨一下：你是在坚持原则，还是在维护面子？
uprightMeaningEn: Defending your territory. You've built something and someone's testing the fences. Stand firm but don't become a fortress.
reversedMeaningEn: Defensive to the point of paranoia. Not everyone is attacking your kingdom. Lower the drawbridge occasionally.

name: 加速加速加速
uprightMeaning: 一切都开始动了！消息、事件、机会接踵而至。别分析太多，顺势而行。这个阶段不适合深思熟虑，适合快速反应。
reversedMeaning: 卡住了。本来应该很快的事都慢下来了。别暴躁，堵车的时候按喇叭也不会让路通畅。
uprightMeaningEn: Things are moving fast — almost too fast. Adapt or get whiplash. The momentum is good even if the speed is scary.
reversedMeaningEn: Moving too fast and dropping things. Slow down before you cause a crash that wasn't necessary. Speed limits exist for a reason.

name: 最后一道坎
uprightMeaning: 你很累了，但就差最后一哆嗦。你身上有伤，但你还在站着。这个坎过了就好了。喘口气，擦擦汗，走完最后一程。
reversedMeaning: 你想放弃了。或者你在过度防守——别人没想攻击你，你先把盾举起来了。不必要地给自己加了太多防线。
uprightMeaningEn: You've been through the wands wringer and you're still standing. Resilience is your brand now. Don't give up at the 90% mark.
reversedMeaningEn: Burnout is knocking and you're pretending you can't hear it. Pushing through stopped being heroic three exhaustion levels ago. Rest.

name: 累成狗
uprightMeaning: 你背了太多东西。工作、家庭、别人的期待——全扛在自己肩上。能者多劳可以，但不能劳死。看看哪些是你真的需要扛的，哪些可以放下。
reversedMeaning: 你不堪重负了。要么是该放的终于放下了，要么是你已经扛出问题来了。学会说"不"是你最近的必修课。
uprightMeaningEn: You're carrying a lot. Too much, honestly. Delegate, drop, or distribute before your back (and spirit) gives out.
reversedMeaningEn: The burden broke you. You took on too much and now everything's on the floor. It's okay. Pick up what matters; leave what doesn't.

name: 三分钟热度
uprightMeaning: 有个新想法让你兴奋得像捡到钱。这个热情是好的，但先试试水，别一上来就 all in。探索阶段最重要的是——低成本试错。
reversedMeaning: 点子很多，一个都没落地。或者你开始了一个新东西然后发现——呃，好像不是那么回事。放弃也是一种智慧。
uprightMeaningEn: An exciting message or opportunity inbound. Your enthusiasm is contagious — spread it responsibly.
reversedMeaningEn: Bad news, delayed message, or cold feet about an opportunity. The enthusiasm has waned. Rekindle or release, but don't ghost.

name: 先跑再说
uprightMeaning: 你就是一团火！对某事充满激情，迫不及待要行动。去吧！但要稍微看一眼脚下的路。不是让你别跑，是让你跑的时候别绊倒。
reversedMeaning: 冲太快了，摔了。或者你的热情烧到了不该烧的地方。还有一种可能——你说了半天要做，结果没做。
uprightMeaningEn: Bold, passionate, charging forward. You know what you want and you're going after it. Just don't trample the bystanders.
reversedMeaningEn: Reckless and chaotic. Bold without brains is just noise. Temper the charge with a crumb of strategy.

name: 又美又飒
uprightMeaning: 你的自信就是你最强大的吸引力。现在你进入一个空间，别人会自动注意到你。用你的热情去感染别人，大胆展示自己，不用客气。
reversedMeaning: 自信过了变成自大，或者你最近有点自我怀疑。别拿自己和社交媒体上的人比——他们只发了最好看的那三秒。
uprightMeaningEn: Warm, confident, magnetic. You're the leader people actually want to follow. Lead with vision and don't forget the little people.
reversedMeaningEn: Warmth turned to manipulation. Your charisma is being used for control, not connection. People aren't projects.

name: 大boss
uprightMeaning: 你是那个有远见、敢做决定的人。别人可能在纠结细节，你已经看到了全景。带领而不是指挥——这两者的区别是，带领者走在前面。
reversedMeaning: 你的强势可能正在压到别人。或者你的"远见"其实是一厢情愿——听听团队怎么说。还有一种可能：你做决定太快，欠考虑。
uprightMeaningEn: The visionary who gets things done. You've mastered the art of starting AND finishing. That's rare. That's powerful. That's you.
reversedMeaningEn: Vision without execution. You know where you want to go but you've stopped walking. A map is not a journey. Take a step.

name: 清醒时刻
uprightMeaning: 一个清晰的念头出现了——像一把刀切开迷雾。你突然知道该怎么做了。这个思路是干净的、锋利的，别让它被周围人的意见磨钝。
reversedMeaning: 想不清楚。脑子像一团浆糊，越想越乱。别硬想了，去睡一觉或者跑个步——清醒的大脑不来自更多思考，来自更好的状态。
uprightMeaningEn: A breakthrough thought arrives like lightning. Sharp, sudden, and slightly terrifying. Write it down before it vanishes.
reversedMeaningEn: The idea is there but you won't let it land. Afraid of your own thoughts. Write it down anyway; the paper can handle it.

name: 眼不见为净
uprightMeaning: 你把眼睛蒙上了——两个选项你都不太想面对。但你不能永远蒙着眼。先承认自己确实需要选，然后找一个你信任的人聊聊。
reversedMeaning: 被逼着做决定了。或者信息终于充分到你没法再假装看不见。虽然难受，但这其实是解脱的开始。
uprightMeaningEn: You're at a crossroads and neither option is clear. The classic hard choice. Pick the one that costs you your illusions, not your values.
reversedMeaningEn: Indecision has become its own choice. By not choosing, you've chosen stagnation. Both options are survivable. Pick one.

name: 扎心了
uprightMeaning: 疼。某人说了真话或者你看到了不想看到的真相。三把剑插在心上——但注意，剑是宝剑组的东西，代表理智。有时候痛苦来自于终于看清。
reversedMeaning: 伤口在愈合，但你还在反复揭开看。或者你拒绝承认自己受伤了。允许自己疼一阵子，然后让时间去做它该做的事。
uprightMeaningEn: Heartbreak in card form. Something hurts and it's okay to acknowledge it. Feeling pain means you cared. That's not weakness.
reversedMeaningEn: The pain is processing. Grief isn't linear and you're in the messy middle. Keep feeling it. The only way out is through.

name: 关机休息
uprightMeaning: 你的大脑需要关机。不是睡觉，是真正的精神休息——不刷手机、不思考问题、不焦虑明天。哪怕就半小时，躺着什么都不想。
reversedMeaning: 休息好了，可以起来了。或者你根本睡不着——脑子里一直在跑火车。如果是后者，试试写下来再睡。
uprightMeaningEn: Rest is not optional right now. Your brain has been running a marathon and it needs a nap. Lie down. The thoughts will wait.
reversedMeaningEn: Restless rest. You're physically still but mentally spinning. That's not rest, that's just lying down while stressed. Try again.

name: 赢了但输了
uprightMeaning: 你赢了——但你回头看，满地狼藉，人都走了。这个胜利是空的。下次考虑一下：赢重要，还是关系重要？
reversedMeaning: 你在后悔那场架。或者你在想着怎么弥补。道歉不丢人，继续嘴硬才丢人。
keywords: 吵架赢了场面输了关系
uprightMeaningEn: Conflict. You might be the instigator or the target — either way, don't fight dirty. Win the battle without losing yourself.
reversedMeaningEn: Conflict aftermath — you won but the battlefield is still smoking. Victory can feel like loss when the cost was too high. Rebuild.

name: 离开烂摊子
uprightMeaning: 你在离开一段混乱、一个不好的人、或者一个有毒的环境。过程可能有点颠，但船在往前走。前方有平静的水面——坚持划。
reversedMeaning: 船不动。你走不了——可能是外部原因，可能是在情感上还没准备好。没关系，先打包行李，走的那天会来的。
uprightMeaningEn: You're moving away from a hard situation. The boat is crossing rough water but the other shore is better. Keep rowing.
reversedMeaningEn: You left but you're looking back. The journey away is complete but your heart hasn't received the memo. Keep sailing.

name: 偷偷摸摸
uprightMeaning: 有人在背后搞小动作——也可能是你自己在走"捷径"。不管怎样，这种偷偷摸摸的操作迟早会被发现。考虑一下被发现之后怎么办。
reversedMeaning: 你的小算盘被人看穿了。或者你终于打算光明正大地做一件事了。别怕，正大光明走的路更远。
uprightMeaningEn: Sneaky tactics or strategic maneuvering. Someone's playing 4D chess — make sure it's you and not the person you're trusting.
reversedMeaningEn: You got caught. The sneaky plan unraveled and now you're standing in the evidence. Time for the uncomfortable honesty chapter.

name: 自己困住自己
uprightMeaning: 你觉得被困住了——但其实绑着你的绳子是你自己想的。你觉得自己没选择，其实只是不敢选。看看四周——那些"限制"有多少是真的？
reversedMeaning: 开始挣脱了！你突然发现——哦，原来这些绳子本来就是松的。思维解放比物理解放先发生。
uprightMeaningEn: Feeling trapped by your own thoughts. The cage door is unlocked but you're too busy overthinking to notice. Look again.
reversedMeaningEn: The mental prison is of your own design. The beliefs trapping you are assumptions, not facts. Challenge them like a lawyer cross-examining a hostile witness.

name: 深夜焦虑
uprightMeaning: 凌晨三点，你在想最坏的可能性。你脑子里在播放灾难片——但那些画面90%不会成真。起来喝杯水，告诉自己"天亮了再说"。
reversedMeaning: 焦虑在减轻。或者你终于把压在心里的事说了出来。说出来之后发现——就这？我为什么纠结了这么久？
uprightMeaningEn: The mental anguish is real but you're amplifying it. Your brain is running disaster simulations at 4K resolution. Reduce the graphics settings.
reversedMeaningEn: The worst of it is passing and you're still catastrophizing. Your brain is running worst-case scenarios when the actual situation is just 'kinda bad.' Recalibrate.

name: 彻底完蛋
uprightMeaning: 最差的情况发生了。你被十把剑插在地上——看起来很惨。但注意：到底了就不会再往下掉了。这张牌虽然恐怖，但它意味着——触底之后只有反弹。
reversedMeaning: 你在抗拒触底。你觉得还能再抢救一下，但其实越抢救越深。接受"完了"，才能开始"再来"。
uprightMeaningEn: Rock bottom of the mind. The overthinking spiral has reached its final form. The only way from here is up, and you're closer to release than you think.
reversedMeaningEn: Recovery from mental rock bottom. The thoughts are quieter now but you're still flinching. Healing is a process, not a switch. Be patient with your brain.

name: 爱打听
uprightMeaning: 你在搜集信息，到处打听。这个阶段适合多问多看，但注意——你搜到的东西不一定是真的。保持好奇心，但保持批判性思维。
reversedMeaning: 你太八卦了。或者你说的话太刻薄，把人得罪了。还有一种可能——你的信息来源不太靠谱。
uprightMeaningEn: A sharp-eyed observer with a message. Truth incoming — perhaps delivered bluntly. Receive the intel, don't shoot the messenger.
reversedMeaningEn: The message was mean or maybe just true and that's why it stung. Either way, you needed to hear it. Process before reacting.

name: 嘴快于脑
uprightMeaning: 你说干就干、想说就说，速度和判断力是你现在的超能力。但方向对不对？先看一眼再冲。速度不是一切——撞墙的时候速度越快越疼。
reversedMeaning: 冲错了方向，现在在掉头。或者你跟人吵了一架，事后发现自己是错的那方。承认错误的速度决定了你恢复的速度。
keywords: 行动力极强（但方向可能不对）
uprightMeaningEn: A warrior of the mind charging forward. Bold ideas, fast action, zero hesitation. Impulsive but effective. Aim before you swing.
reversedMeaningEn: Reckless words or impulsive intellectual attacks. Your sharp tongue cut someone who didn't deserve it. Apologies cost nothing and mean everything.

name: 人间清醒
uprightMeaning: 你现在的判断力是顶级的——不感情用事，不被人情绑架。别人觉得你有点冷，但其实你只是不废话。清晰地划出边界，别怕得罪人。
reversedMeaning: 理智过头了——你在用逻辑掩饰情感。或者你太刻薄了，明明可以温柔表达却选了最扎心的说法。
uprightMeaningEn: The thinker with emotional depth. Logic and intuition in harmony — a rare and powerful combination. You see through everything.
reversedMeaningEn: Cold logic without emotional intelligence. You're right but you're also being mean about it. Wisdom pairs clarity with kindness.

name: 不讲情面
uprightMeaning: 你是那个做最终判断的人——不带感情、只看事实。这个角色很孤独，但必须有人做。做出你的裁决，然后坚持它。
reversedMeaning: 你的判断被权力或偏见污染了。或者你太冷酷，不考虑人性因素。规则很重要——但如果规则本身有问题呢？
uprightMeaningEn: The master of mental clarity. You've learned to use the sword without cutting yourself. Authority earned through wisdom, not force.
reversedMeaningEn: Using intellect as a weapon. You've weaponized your intelligence to dominate rather than understand. The smartest person in the room doesn't need to prove it.

name: 发财的机会
uprightMeaning: 一个跟钱/事业/健康有关的好机会出现了——新工作、加薪、投资、或者一个能落地的赚钱想法。这个种子会发芽，但需要你浇水。
reversedMeaning: 机会溜走了，或者你没认出来那是机会。还有一种可能——你在乱花钱，买买买停不下来。
uprightMeaningEn: A tangible opportunity is landing. Money, work, or a physical gift. The universe is making a deposit. Check your account.
reversedMeaningEn: A missed opportunity or bad investment. The deal wasn't as good as it looked. Learn the lesson, don't chase the loss.

name: 两头忙
uprightMeaning: 你在同时处理好几件事——工作、家庭、钱、时间。虽然晃来晃去，但你在维持平衡。像一个抛球的杂耍演员，看起来很悬，但你就是不让他们掉。
reversedMeaning: 失衡了。某个方面垮了——可能是账单、可能是截止日期。你需要停下来重新安排优先级。别硬撑。
uprightMeaningEn: Juggling resources like a pro — or learning to. Balance isn't static; it's constant small adjustments. You're getting better at this.
reversedMeaningEn: Financial juggling gone wrong. You're dropping balls and some of them are made of money. Time for a budget reality check.

name: 干活
uprightMeaning: 你的技能正在被看见。团队合作顺畅，大家各司其职，事情在变好。你在学习或工作中专注打磨的样子，比你在朋友圈里的样子更值得被看到。
reversedMeaning: 团队沟通有问题，或者你在出工不出力。还有一种可能——你的工作质量在下滑，有人注意到了。
uprightMeaningEn: Skill recognition incoming. Someone's noticed your craft and wants to pay you for it. Your expertise has market value.
reversedMeaningEn: Undervaluing your own skills. You're charging amateur rates for professional work. Know your worth and add tax.

name: 死死抱着不撒手
uprightMeaning: 你在死死守住你的东西——钱、资源、地位。守是可以的，但你现在守得有点过头了。抱太紧的时候，也抱不住任何新东西。
reversedMeaning: 你终于松开了——也许是花了一大笔钱，也许是放下了某个执念。松开的感觉是不是其实挺好的？
uprightMeaningEn: Holding onto resources a little too tightly. Saving is smart; hoarding is fear. Money is a tool, not a personality trait.
reversedMeaningEn: Financial anxiety gripping too tight. The scarcity mindset is costing you more than the money you're afraid to lose. Breathe. Spend wisely, not fearfully.

name: 求助信号
uprightMeaning: 你可能正在经历金钱或职业上的低谷。你觉得孤立无援，但其实附近就有帮助——只是你低着头没看到。别因为自尊而拒绝开口求助。
reversedMeaning: 开始好转了。你可能得到了帮助，或者自己找到了出路。最难的不是解决问题，是承认自己需要帮助。
uprightMeaningEn: You're in need and it's okay to ask for help. Everyone hits a rough patch. The pride that stops you from reaching out costs more than the hit to your ego.
reversedMeaningEn: You're isolating in your struggle. The help is available but you're too proud to ask. Pride doesn't pay rent. Reach out.

name: 发工资了
uprightMeaning: 有人给你支持——钱、资源、或机会。也可能反过来，是你在帮别人。注意：给予和被给予之间要平衡，别让施舍变成不平等。
reversedMeaning: 你的付出没有被感谢，或者你欠的债还没还。还有一种可能——有人在利用你的慷慨。看清楚那条线。
uprightMeaningEn: Generosity is your flex right now. Sharing what you have — time, money, knowledge — creates more of it. Abundance mindset, literally.
reversedMeaningEn: Giving beyond your means. Generosity is beautiful; self-sacrifice is not. You can't pour from an empty wallet or an empty soul.

name: 等待收获
uprightMeaning: 你种的东西正在长——但还没到收的时候。站在田边看它，评估进展，但别因为长得不够快就挖出来看看。耐心，是在土里看不见的部分。
reversedMeaning: 你觉得投入产出不成正比——花了时间没看到结果。要不要继续？再等等看，或者换个方向投资。别做沉没成本的俘虏。
uprightMeaningEn: Patience is the strategy. You planted seeds and they're growing, just slower than your anxiety wants. Don't dig them up to check progress.
reversedMeaningEn: Impatience is making you sloppy. The results will come but you're checking the oven every two minutes. Trust the process and stop opening the door.

name: 埋头苦干
uprightMeaning: 你在一个技能上反复打磨——像一个匠人。这个阶段很枯燥，但所有的"厉害"都来自于这个看起来无聊的重复。坚持练习，你的手艺正在变好。
reversedMeaning: 干活的热情没了。你在重复但没有进步——可能因为方向不对，也可能因为你只是在做样子。累了就休息，别假装在工作。
uprightMeaningEn: Mastery through repetition. You're putting in the hours and it shows. The craft is becoming second nature. Keep the rhythm.
reversedMeaningEn: Going through the motions. The craft has become routine and the passion leaked out somewhere. Reconnect with why you started, or start something new.

name: 一个人也很爽
uprightMeaning: 你享受着自己挣来的舒适——不靠别人，完全靠自己。一个人在花园里散步的感觉。你没有在等任何人，你过得挺好的。
reversedMeaning: 物质上是够了，但心里觉得少了点什么。或者你在用消费来填补空虚。东西是好的——但东西不能替代一切。
uprightMeaningEn: Financial (or creative) rewards from your own efforts. You built this with your hands and it's beautiful. Enjoy the fruits without apology.
reversedMeaningEn: Financial setback despite hard work. The effort was there but the results lagged. Don't take it personally; the market is a mood, not a meritocracy.

name: 财务自由
uprightMeaning: 物质层面的终极圆满——财富、房产、家族传承。你在这里积累了坚实的东西。但别只顾着堆砖块，也看看城堡里的人。
reversedMeaning: 财务问题、家庭纠纷、或者你对"有钱"的定义需要修正。也许你在拥有了物质之后发现——它没有解决所有问题。
uprightMeaningEn: Material and emotional wealth achieved. You've built something lasting. The legacy question is no longer 'if' but 'what next.'
reversedMeaningEn: Lost inheritance, bad financial decision, or family money drama. The material world is being difficult. Protect what you have and make no big moves.

name: 理财新手
uprightMeaning: 你在学习一个能赚钱的技能——或者开始认真对待财务规划了。速度慢，但方向对。这个阶段最重要的是养成习惯，不是赚到第一桶金。
reversedMeaning: 学习计划搁浅了，或者你的理财计划不够实际。报了很多网课，看完的没几个。先专注一个。
uprightMeaningEn: A studious soul with a practical offer. Learn something new that pays actual money. Practical skills, unexpected rewards.
reversedMeaningEn: The opportunity was oversold. The study offer or financial tip isn't as valuable as advertised. Read the fine print on the dream they're selling you.

name: 稳如老狗
uprightMeaning: 你是最靠谱的那种人——不炫技、不画饼、但每天都在做。乌龟精神，终点线上你就是赢家。但偶尔也抬头看看，别闷头走错了路。
reversedMeaning: 太慢了。不是稳，是拖。你的靠谱变成了固执——死磕一个不再适合的方法。换条路也是一种靠谱。
uprightMeaningEn: The reliable hard worker. Consistent, grounded, effective. Not flashy, but always gets it done. The team MVP who never asks for credit.
reversedMeaningEn: All grind, no purpose. You're working hard in the wrong direction. Consistent effort is only a virtue if the target is worth hitting.

name: 会过日子
uprightMeaning: 你让身边的人感到安全和被照顾——不是靠花钱，是靠用心。你的家、你的身体、你的钱包——都在你的打理下井井有条。继续做那个可靠的人。
reversedMeaning: 只顾别人不顾自己。你在给所有人做饭，但自己没吃。或者反过来——你只顾自己，变得有点斤斤计较。
uprightMeaningEn: The nurturer who builds real things. Practical and warm — a rare combo. You make people feel safe AND you get stuff done.
reversedMeaningEn: Smothering practicality. Your obsession with security is choking the joy out of life. A safety net is essential; a cage is not.

name: 大佬
uprightMeaning: 你是物质世界里的王者——赚到了、稳住了、还有余力帮别人。但钱到一定程度之后，问问自己：我还能做什么有意义的事？
reversedMeaning: 钱让你安全，但也让你变得只在乎钱。或者你在用财富来控制别人。记住——钱是工具，不是目的。
uprightMeaningEn: The accomplished one. You've climbed the mountain and the view is great. But you know the secret: the real reward was the climb itself.
reversedMeaningEn: Material success without fulfillment. You got everything you wanted and it's not enough. The goal was external; the void is internal. Time for a different kind of wealth.
